title: AI Trust & Safety Digest
tagline: A curated current snapshot of AI trust, safety, and governance, including as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
lead: This cycle’s strongest signal is operationalization: major actors are turning abstract AI safety goals into concrete evaluation, monitoring, assurance, and disclosure mechanisms. The updates span secure evaluation infrastructure, external red teaming of internal controls, public behavior specifications, bug-bounty incentives, and research on manipulation harms—together pointing to a more testable and governable safety stack.

items.title: CAISI signs CRADA with OpenMined for secure AI evaluations
items.why_it_matters: Secure computation could let evaluators test sensitive models without exposing weights, data, or dangerous capabilities.

items.title: METR details red teaming of Anthropic’s internal agent monitoring systems
items.why_it_matters: Independent probing of internal monitoring offers rare evidence about whether agent oversight works in practice.

items.title: OpenAI launches Safety Bug Bounty program
items.why_it_matters: Bug bounties can surface real-world abuse paths, including prompt injection and data exfiltration failures.

items.title: OpenAI explains its approach to the Model Spec
items.why_it_matters: A public behavior spec makes safety tradeoffs and model conduct more legible for auditing and accountability.

items.title: Google DeepMind outlines safeguards against harmful manipulation
items.why_it_matters: Manipulation risk research informs safeguards for high-stakes domains where model persuasion could cause harm.

items.title: Partnership on AI examines assurance for trustworthy AI systems
items.why_it_matters: Assurance frameworks could shape how organizations evidence safety claims to deployers, regulators, and users.

note: Selected from recent trust-and-safety relevant posts and papers by labs, evaluators, standards bodies, policy organizations, and arXiv, then summarized with GPT-5.4. Includes as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
